managers.name: Pep Guardiola
managers.bio: One of the greatest managers of all time, famous for his tiki-taka style and tactical dominance.

managers.name: Jurgen Klopp
managers.bio: Famous for heavy metal football and intense high-pressing (Gegenpressing).

managers.name: Carlo Ancelotti
managers.bio: The only manager to win titles in all of Europe's top five leagues.

managers.name: Mikel Arteta
managers.bio: Guardiola's protege who has transformed Arsenal into a tactical powerhouse.

managers.name: Xabi Alonso
managers.bio: Led Leverkusen to an invincible domestic season with revolutionary 3-at-the-back tactics.

managers.name: Diego Simeone
managers.bio: The master of defensive organization and passionate touchline management.

managers.name: Jose Mourinho
managers.bio: Known as the 'Special One', famous for his tactical discipline and counter-attacking masterclasses.

managers.name: Erik ten Hag
managers.bio: A manager who focuses on disciplined structures and rapid transitions in play.
